						};

							return new Tracker();

							return null;
						};

							var args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
							args.unshift('send');

						var __gaTracker = function () {
							var len = arguments.length;
							if (len === 0) {
								return;
							}
							var f = arguments[len - 1];
							if (typeof f !== 'object' || f === null || typeof f.hitCallback !== 'function') {
								if ('send' === arguments[0]) {

												'eventAction': arguments[3],
												'eventCategory': arguments[2],
												'eventLabel': arguments[4],

											}

											hitObject = {
												'eventAction': 'page_view',
												'page_path': arguments[2],
											}
										}
									}
									if (typeof arguments[2] === 'object') {

									}

										Object.assign(hitObject, arguments[5]);
									}

										hitObject = arguments[1];
										if ('pageview' === hitObject.hitType) {
											hitObject.eventAction = 'page_view';
										}

										hitConverted = mapArgs(hitObject);
										__gtagTracker('event', action, hitConverted);
									}
								}
								return;
							}

							function mapArgs(args) {
								var arg, hit = {};
								var gaMap = {
									'eventCategory': 'event_category',
									'eventAction': 'event_action',
									'eventLabel': 'event_label',

								};

																		if (!(!args.hasOwnProperty(arg) || !gaMap.hasOwnProperty(arg))) {
										hit[gaMap[arg]] = args[arg];
									} else {
										hit[arg] = args[arg];
									}
								}
								return hit;
							}

							try {
								f.hitCallback();
							} catch (ex) {
							}
						};

.has-midnight-gradient-background{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#020381,#2874fc)}:root{--wp--preset--font-size--normal:16px;--wp--preset--font-size--huge:42px}.has-regular-font-size{font-size:1em}.has-larger-font-size{font-size:2.625em}.has-normal-font-size{font-size:var(--wp--preset--font-size--normal)}.has-huge-font-size{font-size:var(--wp--preset--font-size--huge)}.has-text-align-center{text-align:center}.has-text-align-left{text-align:left}.has-text-align-right{text-align:right}.has-fit-text{white-space:nowrap!important}#end-resizable-editor-section{display:none}.aligncenter{clear:both}.items-justified-left{justify-content:flex-start}.items-justified-center{justify-content:center}.items-justified-right{justify-content:flex-end}.items-justified-space-between{justify-content:space-between}.screen-reader-text{border:0;clip-path:inset(50%);height:1px;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;padding:0;position:absolute;width:1px;word-wrap:normal!important}.screen-reader-text:focus{background-color:#ddd;clip-path:none;color:#444;display:block;font-size:1em;height:auto;left:5px;line-height:normal;padding:15px 23px 14px;text-decoration:none;top:5px;width:auto;z-index:100000}html :where(.has-border-color){border-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-top-color]){border-top-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-right-color]){border-right-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-bottom-color]){border-bottom-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-left-color]){border-left-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-width]){border-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-top-width]){border-top-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-right-width]){border-right-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-bottom-width]){border-bottom-style:solid}html :where([style*=border-left-width]){border-left-style:solid}html :where(img[class*=wp-image-]){height:auto;max-width:100%}:where(figure){margin:0 0 1em}html :where(.is-position-sticky){--wp-admin--admin-bar--position-offset:var(--wp-admin--admin-bar--height,0px)}@media screen and (max-width:600px){html :where(.is-position-sticky){--wp-admin--admin-bar--position-offset:0px}}
/*# sourceURL=/wp-includes/css/dist/block-library/common.min.css */
</style>
<style id='otter-font-awesome-style-inline-css'>
.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons{--align: center;--align-tablet: var(--align);--align-mobile: var(--align-tablet);--border-color: inherit;--border-size: unset;--border-radius: 0%;--margin: 5px;--padding: 5px;--font-size: 16px;display:flex;justify-content:var(--align);margin:0}.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons .wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container{display:inline-flex;justify-content:center;border:var(--border-size) solid;border-color:var(--border-color);border-radius:var(--border-radius);margin:var(--margin);font-size:var(--font-size);text-align:center;align-items:center;box-sizing:content-box}.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons .wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container:not(.nan-padding){width:calc(var(--font-size)*1.5 + var(--padding));height:calc(var(--font-size)*1.5 + var(--padding))}.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons .wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container:not(.nan-padding) i{font-size:var(--font-size)}.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons .wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container.nan-padding{padding:var(--padding);aspect-ratio:1}.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons .wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container.nan-padding i{font-size:calc(var(--font-size)/1.25);width:var(--font-size)}.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons .wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container svg{width:var(--font-size);height:var(--font-size);fill:currentColor}@media(max-width: 960px){.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons{justify-content:var(--align-tablet)}}@media(max-width: 600px){.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons{justify-content:var(--align-mobile)}}/*# sourceMappingURL=style.css.map */

html,body
{
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px;
overflow-x:hidden;
}

body {position: relative;}


.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion.icon-first>.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion-item>.wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion-item__title {border-radius: 100px}


.titolo {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-align: center;
}
.titolo:before, .titolo:after {
    position: absolute;
    top: 51%;
    overflow: hidden;
    width: 50%;
    height: 2px;
    content: '\a0';
    background-color: #1D801F;
}
.titolo:before {
    margin-left: -51%;
    text-align: right;
}

.titolo:after {
	margin-left: 1%;
}

.bubble.lt-green {
	background-color: rgba(29,128,31,0.1);
}

.bubble {
	padding: 0.5em 1em;
	border-radius: 100px;
}

.rounded select {

		border: none;
		border-radius: 100px;
		padding: 0.7em 1.2em;
	appearance: none;
	background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,%3csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'%3e%3cpolyline points='6 9 12 15 18 9'%3e%3c/polyline%3e%3c/svg%3e");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: right 1rem center;
    background-size: 1em;
}

.rounded input {
	border: none !important;
	padding: 0em 1em;
}

.shadow {
	text-shadow: 2px 2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}

figure.zoom {
	position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

figure.zoom a img {
	-webkit-transform: scale(1);
	transform: scale(1);
	-webkit-transition: .3s ease-in-out;
	transition: .15s ease-in-out;
	max-width: 100%;
}
figure.zoom:hover a img {
	-webkit-transform: scale(1.15);
	transform: scale(1.15);
}

.simpletoc-collapsible {
    background-color: #fff;
	border-radius: 100px;
}

li.subs {
	border: 1px solid rgb(29, 128, 31);
	border-radius: 100px;
	display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.25em 1em;
}

.lt-sand-bg select {
	background-color: rgb(247, 238, 227);
}

.flexy {
	display: flex;
}

.align-center {
	text-align: center;
}

<script type="wphb-delay-type">
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-2S9X4V1HTL');
</script>

<!-- Snow Storm Javascript -->
<script type="wphb-delay-type" data-wphb-type="text/javascript">
(function($) {
	$(document).ready(function() {		
		if (typeof(snowStorm) !== 'undefined') {
			snowStorm.flakesMax = 128;
			snowStorm.flakesMaxActive = 64;
			snowStorm.animationInterval = 35;
			snowStorm.excludeMobile = true;
			snowStorm.followMouse = false;
			snowStorm.snowColor = '#FFFFFF';
			snowStorm.snowCharacter = '&bull;';
			snowStorm.snowStick = true;
			snowStorm.useMeltEffect = true;
			snowStorm.useTwinkleEffect = false;
			snowStorm.zIndex = 999999;
		}
	});
})(jQuery);
</script><style class='wp-fonts-local'>

	<option class="level-0" value="impianti">IMPIANTI</option>
	<option class="level-0" value="agevolazioni-fiscali-e-normativa">AGEVOLAZIONI FISCALI e NORMATIVA</option>
	<option class="level-0" value="altri-argomenti">ALTRI ARGOMENTI</option>
	<option class="level-0" value="architettura">ARCHITETTURA</option>
</select><script type="wphb-delay-type">
( ( [ dropdownId, homeUrl ] ) => {
		const dropdown = document.getElementById( dropdownId );
		function onSelectChange() {
			setTimeout( () => {
				if ( 'escape' === dropdown.dataset.lastkey ) {
					return;
				}
				if ( dropdown.value && dropdown instanceof HTMLSelectElement ) {
					const url = new URL( homeUrl );
					url.searchParams.set( dropdown.name, dropdown.value );
					location.href = url.href;
				}
			}, 250 );
		}
		function onKeyUp( event ) {
			if ( 'Escape' === event.key ) {
				dropdown.dataset.lastkey = 'escape';
			} else {
				delete dropdown.dataset.lastkey;
			}
		}
		function onClick() {
			delete dropdown.dataset.lastkey;
		}
		dropdown.addEventListener( 'keyup', onKeyUp );
		dropdown.addEventListener( 'click', onClick );
		dropdown.addEventListener( 'change', onSelectChange );
	} )( ["wp-block-categories-1","https://espertocasaclima.com"] );
//# sourceURL=build_dropdown_script_block_core_categories
</script>

</div></div>

<div class="wp-block-comments has-custom-mid-grey-color has-text-color" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0"><h5 id="comments" class="has-custom-mid-grey-color wp-block-comments-title has-small-font-size">2 risposte</h5></div>


<div style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0" class="taxonomy-category has-text-align-right wp-block-post-terms has-small-font-size"><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/category/isolamento-solaio/solaio-verso-terreno/" rel="tag">solaio verso terreno</a><span class="wp-block-post-terms__separator">, </span><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/category/isolamento-solaio/materiali-solaio/" rel="tag">materiali solaio</a><span class="wp-block-post-terms__separator">, </span><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/category/isolamento-solaio/finitura-solaio/" rel="tag">finitura solaio</a></div></div>


<h3 class="wp-block-post-title"><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2026/02/20/pavimento-contro-terra-quando-la-calce-sfida-cemento-bitume-e-igloo/" target="_self" >Pavimento contro terra: la calce sfida cemento, bitume e igloo</a></h3>

<div class="wp-block-post-excerpt has-normal-font-size"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">dal 2020: 99 Mentre tutti si ammazzano per impermeabilizzare cementificare e dividere gli strati orizzontali con fogli in PE, ci sono ancora ribelli e&hellip; </p></div>

<a style="border-top-width:0px;border-top-style:none;border-right-width:0px;border-right-style:none;border-bottom-width:1px;border-left-width:0px;border-left-style:none; margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30);" class="wp-block-read-more has-normal-font-size has-figtree-font-family" href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2026/02/20/pavimento-contro-terra-quando-la-calce-sfida-cemento-bitume-e-igloo/" target="_self">Leggi tutto<span class="screen-reader-text">: Pavimento contro terra: la calce sfida cemento, bitume e igloo</span></a></div>
</div>

</li></ul></div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-query alignfull is-layout-constrained wp-block-query-is-layout-constrained"><ul class="columns-2 alignwide wp-block-post-template is-layout-grid wp-container-core-post-template-is-layout-93e7e78d wp-block-post-template-is-layout-grid"><li class="wp-block-post post-82794 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-costruire-in-terra-cruda category-solaio-verso-terreno category-finitura-interna-parete category-drenaggio-terreno-umidita tag-casa-in-argilla">

<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-sabbia-light-background-color has-background is-vertical is-content-justification-stretch is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-32dfcbd2 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-top-color:var(--wp--preset--color--custom-verde);border-top-width:2px;min-height:360px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">
<div class="wp-block-columns are-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-7c9548a8 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="border-style:none;border-width:0px;border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-87436 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-isolamento-interno tag-acqua-pulita tag-calce-idrata tag-latte-di-calce tag-preparazione-muratura">

<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-sabbia-light-background-color has-background is-vertical is-content-justification-stretch is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-32dfcbd2 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-top-color:var(--wp--preset--color--custom-verde);border-top-width:2px;min-height:360px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">
<div class="wp-block-columns are-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-7c9548a8 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="border-style:none;border-width:0px;border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">
<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-3f7b68c1 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;flex-basis:50%"><figure style="aspect-ratio:3/2;width:100%;height:100%;" class="zoom wp-block-post-featured-image wp-duotone-unset-5"><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2026/01/16/acqua-pulita-e-calce-idrata-la-mano-antica-che-prepara-il-muro/" target="_self"  style="height:100%"><img width="250" height="132" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Acqua-pulita-e-calce-idrata-per-nutrire-il-muro-in-laterizio-01-250x132.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" class="attachment-medium size-medium wp-post-image lazyload" alt="Acqua pulita e calce idrata, la mano antica che prepara il muro" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 250px; <div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-e05e1981 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:0;padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<div class="wp-block-group is-content-justification-space-between is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-2f2f9fc8 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-right-style:none;border-right-width:0px;border-left-style:none;border-left-width:0px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0">

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-88422 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-cause-della-muffa tag-caldaia-a-gas-metano tag-bioedilizia tag-autonomia-energetica tag-case-nzeb tag-inquinamento-domestico tag-case-nel-bosco-abruzzo tag-riscaldamento-senza-gas tag-silenzio-del-bosco tag-muffa-in-casa tag-liberta-educativa tag-vita-sostenibile tag-rumore-del-traffico tag-isolamento-naturale tag-minimalismo-naturale tag-abitare-nel-bosco tag-vivere-off-grid tag-umidita-di-risalita tag-stile-di-vita-sostenibile tag-educazione-nel-bosco tag-vivere-in-campagna tag-vita-nel-bosco tag-famiglia-alternativa tag-bambini-e-natura tag-ritorno-alla-natura tag-famiglia-nel-bosco tag-critica-alla-modernita tag-vivere-con-la-natura tag-case-salubri tag-nathan-e-catherine tag-vivere-fuori-citta tag-case-ecologiche tag-vivere-senza-metano tag-vivere-senza-muffa tag-decrescita-felice tag-vita-semplice tag-scelta-ecologica tag-vivere-senza-inquinamento tag-critica-al-consumo tag-qualita-dellaria-indoor tag-casa-naturale">

<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-sabbia-light-background-color has-background is-vertical is-content-justification-stretch is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-32dfcbd2 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-top-color:var(--wp--preset--color--custom-verde);border-top-width:2px;min-height:360px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">
<div class="wp-block-columns are-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-7c9548a8 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="border-style:none;border-width:0px;border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">
<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-3f7b68c1 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;flex-basis:50%"><figure style="aspect-ratio:3/2;width:100%;height:100%;" class="zoom wp-block-post-featured-image wp-duotone-unset-12"><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2025/11/28/la-famiglia-che-vive-nel-bosco-senza-muffa-e-senza-inquinamento/" target="_self"  style="height:100%"><img width="250" height="132" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/La-famiglia-nel-bosco-vive-senza-muffa-e-senza-inquinamento-20-250x132.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" class="attachment-medium size-medium wp-post-image lazyload" alt="La famiglia che vive nel bosco, senza muffa e senza inquinamento" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 250px; <div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-e05e1981 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:0;padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<div class="wp-block-group is-content-justification-space-between is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-2f2f9fc8 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-right-style:none;border-right-width:0px;border-left-style:none;border-left-width:0px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0">

<div style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0;padding-right:0;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;margin-left:0;margin-right:0" class="taxonomy-category wp-block-post-terms has-small-font-size wp-container-content-9cfa9a5a"><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/category/isolamento-parete/isolamento-interno/" rel="tag">isolamento interno</a></div></div>

<div class="wp-block-group is-content-justification-left is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-271c04f7 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30);padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)"><h3 class="wp-block-post-title"><a href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2025/10/10/isolamento-interno-scala-della-cantina/" target="_self" >Isolamento interno della scala della cantina</a></h3></div>
</div>

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-86607 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-energia-elettrica category-acqua-calda-sanitaria-acs-solare-termico category-riscaldamento tag-autolettura-luce tag-autolettura-gas tag-autolettura-acqua tag-foglio-excel-autolettura-luce-gas-e-acqua">

<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-sabbia-light-background-color has-background is-vertical is-content-justification-stretch is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-32dfcbd2 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="border-top-color:var(--wp--preset--color--custom-verde);border-top-width:2px;min-height:360px;padding-top:0;padding-right:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0">

<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion-d70ed1da" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion exclusive no-gap icon-first has-icon has-open-icon is-style-default has-light-title-bg">
<details class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion-item"><summary class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion-item__title"><div><strong>Richiedi una consulenza partendo da qui</strong></div></summary><div class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-accordion-item__content">
<p style="text-transform:none">Contattaci per una Consulenza tecnica e relativo preventivo con il modulo qui sotto (se non ricevi risposta, verifica domani nella casella spam):</p>



<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-7846d321" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form" data-option-name="c2eb8bd854e208da2f71112e4c77e4f3b4dc3c84_7846d321"><form class="otter-form__container">
<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-01557aeb" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input"><label for="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-01557aeb-input" class="otter-form-input-label"><span class="otter-form-input-label__label">oggetto della richiesta</span><span class="required">*</span></label><input type="text" id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-01557aeb-input" required class="otter-form-input"/></div>



<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-335fa097" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input"><label for="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-335fa097-input" class="otter-form-input-label"><span class="otter-form-input-label__label">il tuo nome</span><span class="required">*</span></label><input type="text" id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-335fa097-input" required class="otter-form-input"/></div>



<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-9ee73827" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input"><label for="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-9ee73827-input" class="otter-form-input-label"><span class="otter-form-input-label__label">la tua email</span><span class="required">*</span></label><input type="email" id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-9ee73827-input" required class="otter-form-input"/></div>



<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-9d11d1e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input"><label for="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-9d11d1e3-input" class="otter-form-input-label"><span class="otter-form-input-label__label">il tuo numero di telefono mobile ci serve per darti SMS di conferma</span><span class="required">*</span></label><input type="number" id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-input-9d11d1e3-input" required placeholder="" class="otter-form-input"/></div>



<div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-textarea-3c5eca12" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-textarea"><label for="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-textarea-3c5eca12-input" class="otter-form-textarea-label"><span class="otter-form-textarea-label__label">scrivi la tua richiesta allo studio espertocasaclima</span><span class="required">*</span></label><textarea id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-form-textarea-3c5eca12-input" required rows="10" class="otter-form-textarea-input"></textarea><span class="o-form-help">per maggior chiarezza aggiungi anche il CAP e/o la località in cui si trova l&#8217;edificio (o meglio ancora l&#8217;indirizzo esatto per visione da GoogleMaps)</span></div>



<p class="has-custom-verde-color has-text-color" style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.122), 15px);">inviando questo modulo l&#8217;utente accetta di ricevere risposta via e-mail e SMS dallo Studio espertocasaclima (nessuna newsletter e/o comunicazione commerciale)</p>



<p>Nota importante:  nel 2025 le richieste di consulenza sono aumentate molto.<br />Per poterle leggere con attenzione, la redazione di un preventivo personalizzato prevede un contributo di 50€<br />(che verrà scalato dal costo finale della consulenza).</p>



<p>Il pagamento può avvenire tramite bonifico bancario o <a href="https://tinyurl.com/4phz8mc7">PayPal</a></p>

<div class="wp-block-group alignfull is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-0822fb6f wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="margin-top:0px;margin-bottom:0px;padding-top:20px;padding-bottom:20px">
<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading alignfull has-text-align-left titolo has-figtree-font-family has-medium-font-size" id="esperti" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:0;padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:0;text-transform:uppercase">Incontra gli esperti</h2>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-0105b26b wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-radius:5px;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:0;padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:0">
<div class="wp-block-group is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-5f7fa443 wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-style:none;border-width:0px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60);padding-right:0;padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60);padding-left:0">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full is-resized is-style-rounded"><img width="300" height="300" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/federico-sampaoli-espertocasaclima.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-28876 lazyload" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 300px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 300/300;object-fit:cover;width:100px;height:100px" data-srcset="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/federico-sampaoli-espertocasaclima.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 300w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/federico-sampaoli-espertocasaclima-250x250.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 250w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/federico-sampaoli-espertocasaclima-125x125.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 125w" data-sizes="auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" data-original-sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" /></figure>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">Federico Sampaoli</h3>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size">dr. esperto CasaClima</p>

<p class="has-text-align-center" style="text-transform:none"><strong><a href="https://wp.me/P9uw8S-5Mz">Esperto</a> in:</strong> proposte di isolamento termico, involucro edilizio</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);text-transform:none">“<em>si è sempre fatto così</em>” non è sinonimo di tradizione. Progettare per risparmiare energia è progettare l’isolamento termico, cioè l’involucro super performante per un edificio confortevolissimo. La scelta dell’isolamento termico comincia in un&#8217;area di ricerca e analisi, continua con la simulazione di soluzioni, materiali e spessori diversi attraverso il Calcolo termico, prosegue con un&#8217;analisi dei costi per materiali e si conclude con i dettagli escutivi, anche in 3D, necessari alla perfetta comprensione della soluzione scelta. Propongo sempre materiali non pericolosi per la salute, evitando, per principio, tutto quanto mi sembra rischioso: <em>da un cantiere non inquinato può nascere un’abitazione sana</em>.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained"></div>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60);margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30)">altre figure professionali, in poche parole&#8230; un team:</h4>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-48889432 wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70)">

<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-top is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<div class="wp-block-group is-content-justification-left is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-12dd3699 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:5px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-border-color has-custom-verde-border-color is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-338bb1b3 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-width:1px;border-radius:0px;padding-top:20px;padding-right:20px;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:20px">

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Marco de Pinto</h4>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size">Perito Industriale Termotecnico</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none"><strong>Esperto in:</strong> progettazione impianti, progettazione termotecnica</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);text-transform:none">Le case non sono tutte uguali, nè le esigenze dei committenti lo sono, né le zone climatiche italiane: ad ogni progetto il suo progetto di impianti!  L’involucro dell’edificio svolge il lavoro più gravoso di protezione dal freddo e dal caldo – ma cosa sarebbe una casa ben isolata se si installassero impianti inadeguati o sovradimensionati ?</p>



<ul class="wp-block-social-links is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-social-links-is-layout-1029f969 wp-block-social-links-is-layout-flex"><li class="wp-social-link wp-social-link-linkedin  wp-block-social-link"><a rel="https://www.linkedin.com/in/marco-de-pinto-a7b04942/" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/marco-de-pinto-a7b04942/" class="wp-block-social-link-anchor"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M19.7,3H4.3C3.582,3,3,3.582,3,4.3v15.4C3,20.418,3.582,21,4.3,21h15.4c0.718,0,1.3-0.582,1.3-1.3V4.3 C21,3.582,20.418,3,19.7,3z M8.339,18.338H5.667v-8.59h2.672V18.338z M7.004,8.574c-0.857,0-1.549-0.694-1.549-1.548 c0-0.855,0.691-1.548,1.549-1.548c0.854,0,1.547,0.694,1.547,1.548C8.551,7.881,7.858,8.574,7.004,8.574z M18.339,18.338h-2.669 v-4.177c0-0.996-0.017-2.278-1.387-2.278c-1.389,0-1.601,1.086-1.601,2.206v4.249h-2.667v-8.59h2.559v1.174h0.037 c0.356-0.675,1.227-1.387,2.526-1.387c2.703,0,3.203,1.779,3.203,4.092V18.338z"></path></svg><span class="wp-block-social-link-label screen-reader-text">LinkedIn</span></a></li></ul>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-group is-content-justification-left is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-12dd3699 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:5px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-border-color has-custom-verde-border-color is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-00588d1e wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-width:1px;border-radius:0px;padding-top:20px;padding-right:20px;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:20px">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full is-resized is-style-rounded"><img data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/Fabio-de-Luca-jpg.webp?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-27970 lazyload" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 400px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 400/400;width:100px;height:100px" data-sizes="(max-width: 400px) 100vw, 400px" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" /></figure>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Fabio de Luca</h4>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size">Architetto</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none"><strong>Esperto in</strong>: progettazione architettonica</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-normal-font-size" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);text-transform:none">Nel rapporto committente / progettista l’empatia è importantissima: vi aiuto a definire gli obiettivi del progetto, poi lavoro affinché rispecchi le vostre idee e le vostre aspettative. Tutto in funzione del vostro budget di spesa.  Vi esonero dall’enorme carico burocratico / documentale che c’è dietro ad ogni opera edile: qui il fai da te non è possibile.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-social-links aligncenter is-layout-flex wp-container-core-social-links-is-layout-9f1a95c5 wp-block-social-links-is-layout-flex"><li class="wp-social-link wp-social-link-linkedin  wp-block-social-link"><a rel="https://www.linkedin.com/in/fabiodelucaarchitettobim/" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/fabiodelucaarchitettobim/" class="wp-block-social-link-anchor"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M19.7,3H4.3C3.582,3,3,3.582,3,4.3v15.4C3,20.418,3.582,21,4.3,21h15.4c0.718,0,1.3-0.582,1.3-1.3V4.3 C21,3.582,20.418,3,19.7,3z M8.339,18.338H5.667v-8.59h2.672V18.338z M7.004,8.574c-0.857,0-1.549-0.694-1.549-1.548 c0-0.855,0.691-1.548,1.549-1.548c0.854,0,1.547,0.694,1.547,1.548C8.551,7.881,7.858,8.574,7.004,8.574z M18.339,18.338h-2.669 v-4.177c0-0.996-0.017-2.278-1.387-2.278c-1.389,0-1.601,1.086-1.601,2.206v4.249h-2.667v-8.59h2.559v1.174h0.037 c0.356-0.675,1.227-1.387,2.526-1.387c2.703,0,3.203,1.779,3.203,4.092V18.338z"></path></svg><span class="wp-block-social-link-label screen-reader-text">LinkedIn</span></a></li></ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading alignfull has-text-align-left titolo has-figtree-font-family has-medium-font-size" id="servizi" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70);padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:0;padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:0;text-transform:uppercase">i nostri servizi</h2>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-9b1db0e5 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70)">
<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide is-not-stacked-on-mobile is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-1da03c2a wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-5dafc681 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-arancio-background-color has-background is-content-justification-center is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-571c5ffb wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:100px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:16px;padding-right:16px;padding-bottom:16px;padding-left:16px">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img width="700" height="700" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/energia-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-27976 lazyload" data-srcset="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/energia-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 700w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/energia-1-250x250.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 250w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/energia-1-125x125.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 125w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/energia-1.png?size=512x512&lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 512w" data-sizes="auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 700px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 700/700;" data-original-sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, 700px" /></figure>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100%">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left has-medium-font-size">Proposte isolamento termico</h3>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="margin-top:10px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-right:0;padding-left:0">
<p class="has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Progettazione&nbsp;dell’&nbsp;involucro&nbsp;edilizio: stratigrafie tetto, pareti, solaio, fondazioni, attenuazione ponti termici&#8230; con Calcolo delle Proprietà termiche dei componenti edilizi, materiali idonei, Schede tecniche e di posa, Voci di capitolato, Dichiarazioni di prestazione e Numero DoP, Certificati termici, Conformità ai CAM, Schede di Sicurezza + assistenza mirata in cantiere</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide is-not-stacked-on-mobile is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-b5bd292d wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-5dafc681 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-arancio-background-color has-background is-content-justification-center is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-571c5ffb wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:100px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:16px;padding-right:16px;padding-bottom:16px;padding-left:16px">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img width="700" height="700" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/tetto-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-27975 lazyload" data-srcset="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/tetto-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 700w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/tetto-1-250x250.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 250w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/tetto-1-125x125.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 125w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/tetto-1.png?size=512x512&lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 512w" data-sizes="auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 700px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 700/700;" data-original-sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, 700px" /></figure>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100%">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left has-medium-font-size">Consulenza per tetti in legno</h3>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="margin-top:10px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-right:0;padding-left:0">
<p class="has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Verifica del progetto del tetto in legno, verifica dei materiali previsti nella stratigrafia del tetto, verifiche tecniche sulla scelta dell&#8217; isolamento termico e acustico (trasmittanza, sfasamento estivo, fono isolamento) e sul rischio di condense interstiziali, proposte alternative o correttive a quanto già previsto. Un tetto in legno senza errori 🙂</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide is-not-stacked-on-mobile is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-b5bd292d wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-5dafc681 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-arancio-background-color has-background is-content-justification-center is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-571c5ffb wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:100px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:16px;padding-right:16px;padding-bottom:16px;padding-left:16px">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img width="700" height="700" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/heating-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-27977 lazyload" data-srcset="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/heating-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 700w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/heating-1-250x250.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 250w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/heating-1-125x125.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 125w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/heating-1.png?size=512x512&lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 512w" data-sizes="auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 700px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 700/700;" data-original-sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, 700px" /></figure>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100%">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left has-medium-font-size">Progettazione termotecnica ed impiantistica</h3>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="margin-top:10px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-right:0;padding-left:0">
<p class="has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Progettazione termotecnica 2D 3D, BIM, progettazione Passivhaus, Blower Door test UNI 13829, progettazione e bilanciamento impianti VMC</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide is-not-stacked-on-mobile is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-b5bd292d wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-5dafc681 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-arancio-background-color has-background is-content-justification-center is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-571c5ffb wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:100px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:16px;padding-right:16px;padding-bottom:16px;padding-left:16px">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img width="700" height="700" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/architecture-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-27978 lazyload" data-srcset="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/architecture-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 700w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/architecture-1-250x250.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 250w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/architecture-1-125x125.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 125w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/architecture-1.png?size=512x512&lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 512w" data-sizes="auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 700px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 700/700;" data-original-sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, 700px" /></figure>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100%">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left has-medium-font-size">Progettazione architettonica</h3>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="margin-top:10px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-right:0;padding-left:0">
<p class="has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Progettazione architettonica, BIM, progettazione Passivhaus</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide is-not-stacked-on-mobile is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-b5bd292d wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-container-core-column-is-layout-5dafc681 wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100px">
<div class="wp-block-group has-custom-arancio-background-color has-background is-content-justification-center is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-571c5ffb wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-radius:100px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:16px;padding-right:16px;padding-bottom:16px;padding-left:16px">
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img width="700" height="700" data-src="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/copywriting-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1" alt="" class="wp-image-27979 lazyload" data-srcset="https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/copywriting-1.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 700w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/copywriting-1-250x250.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 250w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/copywriting-1-125x125.png?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 125w, https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/copywriting-1.png?size=512x512&lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1 512w" data-sizes="auto" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 700px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 700/700;" data-original-sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, 700px" /></figure>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-vertically-aligned-center is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="flex-basis:100%">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left has-medium-font-size">Copywriter per edilizia</h3>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="margin-top:10px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-right:0;padding-left:0">
<p class="has-normal-font-size" style="text-transform:none">Forse hai già un sito internet, o un blog aziendale, per essere più vicino ai Tuoi clienti ma hai poco tempo da dedicarci.  Oppure Ti mancano i contenuti.  O vorresti finalmente ottimizzare il lavoro che hai già fatto? &#8230; il modo migliore per aumentare le visite al Tuo sito, è scrivere chiari, semplici e utili contenuti con l’intento di informare correttamente i lettori.   Ai lettori si devono dare sempre: le risposte che cercano, le informazioni che vogliono, e la documentazione che desiderano scaricare.  Offro tutta la mia competenza per confezionare grandi contenuti.</p>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained">
<h4 class="wp-block-heading alignwide has-text-align-left titolo has-figtree-font-family" id="risposte" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:0;padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:0">RISPOSTE AI LETTORI</h4>



<div class="wp-block-group alignwide has-custom-sabbia-light-background-color has-background has-normal-font-size is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-bottom-left-radius:40px;border-bottom-right-radius:40px"><ol style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-left:0;padding-right:0;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;margin-left:0;margin-right:0;" class="has-avatars has-dates has-excerpts wp-block-latest-comments"><li class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment"><img alt='' data-src='https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/wphb-cache/gravatar/6b1/6b1c56bbd26b946bb9a9ce1228c94cd4x48.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1' data-srcset='https://espertocasaclima.com/wp-content/wphb-cache/gravatar/6b1/6b1c56bbd26b946bb9a9ce1228c94cd4x96.jpg 2x' class='avatar avatar-48 photo wp-block-latest-comments__comment-avatar lazyload' height='48' width='48' decoding='async' data-sizes='auto' src='data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==' style='--smush-placeholder-width: 48px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 48/48;' data-original-sizes='(max-width: 48px) 100vw, 48px' /><article><footer class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-meta"><a class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-author" href="https://espertocasaclima.com">Federico Sampaoli</a> su <a class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-link" href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2026/02/20/pavimento-contro-terra-quando-la-calce-sfida-cemento-bitume-e-igloo/comment-page-1/#comment-138308">Pavimento contro terra: la calce sfida cemento, bitume e igloo</a><time datetime="2026-02-21T19:30:04+01:00" class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-date">21 Febbraio 2026</time></footer><div class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-excerpt"><p>@ gabriele vetro cellulare sì, come primo strato.</p>
</div></article></li><li class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment"><img alt='' data-src='https://b3293332.smushcdn.com/3293332/wp-content/wphb-cache/gravatar/7db/7db005472dc422ca5cbb143a5fd36125x48.jpg?lossy=2&strip=1&webp=1' data-srcset='https://espertocasaclima.com/wp-content/wphb-cache/gravatar/7db/7db005472dc422ca5cbb143a5fd36125x96.jpg 2x' class='avatar avatar-48 photo wp-block-latest-comments__comment-avatar lazyload' height='48' width='48' decoding='async' data-sizes='auto' src='data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==' style='--smush-placeholder-width: 48px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 48/48;' data-original-sizes='(max-width: 48px) 100vw, 48px' /><article><footer class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-meta"><span class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-author">Gabrirle</span> su <a class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-link" href="https://espertocasaclima.com/2026/02/20/pavimento-contro-terra-quando-la-calce-sfida-cemento-bitume-e-igloo/comment-page-1/#comment-138306">Pavimento contro terra: la calce sfida cemento, bitume e igloo</a><time datetime="2026-02-21T18:41:52+01:00" class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-date">21 Febbraio 2026</time></footer><div class="wp-block-latest-comments__comment-excerpt"><p>Salve, sostituire alcuni componenti degli strati con vetro cellulare in granuli non potrebbe apportare dei benefici ?</p>

<script type="wphb-delay-type" src="https://hb.wpmucdn.com/espertocasaclima.com/27364882-47b6-4416-a846-f75634336704.js" id="otter-accordion-js" defer></script>
<script type="wphb-delay-type" id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Vai al contenuto';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
//# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after
</script>
<script type="wphb-delay-type" src="https://hb.wpmucdn.com/espertocasaclima.com/8983a93b-e2cf-4f26-8468-dbe7cbaace2d.js" id="wp-hooks-js"></script>
<script type="wphb-delay-type" src="https://hb.wpmucdn.com/espertocasaclima.com/13b7688a-412a-4595-aa2a-7ab6a730acad.js" id="wp-i18n-js"></script>

</script>
